mapper.insert: INSERT INTO deceased_data ( deceased_name, gender, deceased_age, personality, deceased_nickname, user_nickname, relationship, speaking_tone, tone_style ) VALUES ( #{deceasedName}, #{gender}, #{deceasedAge}, #{personality}, #{deceasedNickname}, #{userNickname}, #{relationship}, #{speakingTone}, #{toneStyle} )
mapper.select: SELECT dd.deceased_code AS deceasedCode, dd.deceased_name AS deceasedName, dd.deceased_nickname AS deceasedNickname, s.subscription_code AS subscriptionCode, MAX(c.message_time) AS latestCallTime FROM deceased_data dd JOIN subscription s ON dd.deceased_code = s.deceased_code LEFT JOIN contents c ON s.subscription_code = c.subscription_code AND c.service_type = 'call' WHERE s.user_code = #{userCode} AND s.service_code = 2 GROUP BY dd.deceased_code, dd.deceased_name, dd.deceased_nickname, s.subscription_code ORDER BY latestCallTime DESC NULLS LAST

SELECT dd.deceased_code AS deceasedCode, dd.deceased_name AS deceasedName, dd.deceased_nickname AS deceasedNickname, s.subscription_code AS subscriptionCode, MAX(c.message_time) AS latestCallTime FROM deceased_data dd JOIN subscription s ON dd.deceased_code = s.deceased_code LEFT JOIN contents c ON s.subscription_code = c.subscription_code AND c.service_type = 'call' WHERE s.user_code = #{userCode} AND s.service_code = 3 GROUP BY dd.deceased_code, dd.deceased_name, dd.deceased_nickname, s.subscription_code ORDER BY latestCallTime DESC NULLS LAST
